day_after_planting.unit: days (first pick at 60–70 days, 10–15 picks over 1½–2 months)

body.en: First harvest can be taken 60–70 days after planting. Expect 10–15 picks over a period of 1½–2 months.
body.si: සිටුවා දින 60–70 කින් පළමු අස්වනු නෙලා ගත හැකිය. මාස 1½–2 ක කාලය තුළ 10–15 වාරයක් අස්වනු නෙලිය හැකිය.
body.ta: நடவுக்குப் பின் 60–70 நாட்களில் முதல் அறுவடை செய்யலாம். 1½–2 மாத காலத்தில் 10–15 சுற்று அறுவடை எதிர்பார்க்கலாம்.

body.quote: First harvesting can be taken around 60-70 days after planting. 10-15 harvesting can be done over a period of 1 ½ – 2 months.
